name: Bold Eagle Acquisition Corp.
business: Bold Eagle Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any specific business combination target and has not engaged in any substantive discussions with any target. The company intends to effectuate its initial business combination using cash from the proceeds of its Initial Public Offering and private placement of shares.
